import { useState } from "react"; import { useNavigate, Link } from "react-router-dom"; import { useAuth } from "../context/AuthContext"; import "./Auth.css"; export default function Register() { const [username, setUsername] = useState(""); const [email, setEmail] = useState(""); const [password, setPassword] = useState(""); const [showPwd, setShowPwd] = useState(false); const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false); const [error, setError] = useState(""); const { register } = useAuth(); const navigate = useNavigate(); const handleSubmit = async (e) => { e.preventDefault(); setLoading(true); setError(""); try { await register(username, email, password); navigate("/"); } catch (err) { setError(err.response?.data?.message || "Registration failed"); } setLoading(false); }; return (
